# Bento Grid
A responsive editorial grid for mixing product stories and feature cards.
## Import
```tsx
import { BentoGrid, BentoCard } from "@/components/ui/bento-grid";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<BentoGrid rowHeight={15} magnification={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **rowHeight** (number) — default: `15`: Row height (rem)
- **magnification** (number): Magnification
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add bento-grid
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/bento-grid
```
